description_long: This lamp features a modern, minimalist design with three large, circular ring-shaped light fixtures suspended from a rectangular ceiling mount by thin, nearly invisible wires. The rings are evenly spaced and aligned in a row, creating a balanced and symmetrical appearance. The mount is a sleek, rectangular bar with subtle perforations or vent-like details on its face, likely for heat dissipation or aesthetic effect. The rings themselves are smooth and appear to be constructed from a matte or semi-gloss material, likely metal or coated aluminum, with integrated diffusers for even light distribution. The overall color scheme is a clean, uniform white, enhancing its contemporary look. This fixture is well-suited for modern urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern pendant lamp with three large, white circular rings suspended from a rectangular ceiling mount by thin wires. The design is sleek, minimalist, and visually balanced.
description_view_0: Front view showing three evenly spaced circular rings hanging from a rectangular ceiling mount, with all rings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the rectangular mount and the alignment of the three rings in a straight line.
description_view_2: Another front view, identical to view 0, displaying the three rings and the mount from the same perspective.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction of view 1, again showing the slim mount and the linear arrangement of the rings.
